message: Update: New stable tunnel active. Manus Mission eeNDLpGT6W9DFdvsoQzBuT is auditing the site.

summary: Fixed 10 missing product translations (interactive products) and resolved critical syntax errors / duplicate keys in product-translations-data.ts. Verified build success.

findings.description: Critical syntax error (duplicate keys) in product-translations-data.ts fixed.
